valid: For the period 18:00 (UTC) on Wed 15 Jul 2026 to 18:00 (UTC) on Thu 16 Jul 2026
general_synopsis: Low just west of FitzRoy 1015 expected FitzRoy 1018 by midday tomorrow. High Fair Isle 1029 dissipating
